---
title: "Jackie Lay"
subtitle: "art director, illustrator and animator"
format: html
image: http://www.jackielay.com/images/illustration/jackielay_Hillary1.jpg
---

![](http://www.jackielay.com/images/design/jackielay_FreeSpeech.jpg)

![](http://www.jackielay.com/images/illustration/jackielay_Hillary1.jpg)

<http://www.jackielay.com/>
